verdict: VibeFlow v0.6.0: solid foundation with critical doc/code drift. Code quality 7-8/10, security 8/10, but documentation and packaging ship with real defects that break user flows post-install.

consensus_findings.title: .viteflow/ typo in 6+ docs (consensus 3/4 CLIs)
consensus_findings.fix: sed -i '' 's/\.viteflow/.vibeflow/g' docs/*.md; commit as docs:fix path references (.viteflow -> .vibeflow)

consensus_findings.title: Skill mirror write/read mismatch (consensus 3/4 CLIs)
consensus_findings.fix: Add .agents + .github to SKILL_ROOTS in src/skills/registry.ts OR change write targets to .vibeflow + .kiro. Pick ONE source of truth.

consensus_findings.title: Engine priority disagreement (consensus 3/4 CLIs)
consensus_findings.fix: Replace hardcoded ENGINE_PRIORITY + ENGINES arrays with single source: settings.json 'engine_priority'. Default: ['claude', 'codex', 'copilot'].

consensus_findings.title: package.json files omits .agents/skills/ (consensus 2/4 CLIs, codex CRITICAL)
consensus_findings.fix: Add '.agents/skills/skill-creator/' to package.json 'files'. Also: make copySkillCreator warn visibly if source missing instead of silent no-op.

consensus_findings.title: Hook output JSON shape mismatch with doc (codex CRIT)
consensus_findings.fix: Rewrite docs/HOOKS_AND_GUARDRAILS.md L77-84 to show actual runner output (hookSpecificOutput envelope for Claude, top-level for others). Remove the fictional {decision, severity, reason, requiresApproval} example.

consensus_findings.title: doctor requires copilot AND gh (copilot HIGH)
consensus_findings.fix: Change src/commands.ts:179 from AND to OR. Add separate 'gh' probe line. Fixes copilot users on systems where gh is opt-in.

medium_priority.title: Committed lcov.info stale (99.92% vs claimed 100%)
medium_priority.fix: Add 'coverage/' to .gitignore, OR generate in CI, OR check it in a post-test cleanup step.

medium_priority.title: DEPLOYMENT.md stale (0.1.0 vs 0.6.0)
medium_priority.fix: Bump version, refresh tarball gap section, regenerate.

medium_priority.title: Claude engine writes 3 instruction files (CLAUDE.md, AGENTS.md, .agents/instructions.md), spec says 1
medium_priority.fix: Decide which file is canonical. Suggest AGENTS.md (cross-engine). Drop the other two.

medium_priority.title: splitOperators parser in risk.ts does not handle \n (newline-joined commands)
INSTRUCTIONS_BODY 9KB inline template in ai-init.ts
medium_priority.fix: Extract to .agents/instructions/template.md and read at runtime.

medium_priority.title: Codex instructionFiles:[] violates spec
medium_priority.fix: Add codex: instructionFiles: ['AGENTS.md'] for parity with claude.

medium_priority.title: SKILL_ADVISOR_PROTOCOL referenced in command text but not implemented
medium_priority.fix: Implement the protocol OR remove the reference.

medium_priority.title: Per-unit TODO.md / HANDOFF.md documented but not generated
medium_priority.fix: Either implement generation in workflow-artifacts.ts or remove from docs.

medium_priority.title: init defaults to copilot, orchestrate defaults to claude
medium_priority.fix: Pick one default. Make user-configurable in settings.json.

medium_priority.title: Copilot hook config written but engine ignores it
medium_priority.fix: Either: implement vf hook for copilot CLI events, or remove the copilot-hooks.json write.

low_priority: parseInlineList frontmatter breaks on quoted strings with commas
generateWorkflowArtifacts silently no-ops when no phases
Scanner walk silently truncates deep trees (depth 6, files 4000) without warning
Auto-detect Windows .cmd/.bat shims hard-coded to copilot only
gh api copilot quota signal probes wrong product
dispatch build path appends raw string without trim
defaultContext from adapters.ts may be referenced before init
parseSkill name normalization inconsistent with multi-root dedup
ignored_or_validated_false_positive: codex F-4 (branch coverage NaN): documented limitation in coverage-gate.cjs:8-15; surface via ::notice::, not a real bug
codex F-11 (audit prompt references non-existent files): agent prompt was wrong, not code
copilot exit-code-2-vs-0: per Claude 2026 spec, presentDecision returns 0 unconditionally
strengths: Strong risk.ts: 8 attack patterns + $IFS + subshell recursion + quote-aware
Bounded async concurrency with POSIX process-group kill
100% line coverage gate (with documented branch limitation)
TDD workflow, per-file 100% coverage gate, 1253 tests
